author: anon-ab6221f8
content:
Shipped in 8c2707fb. Three layered bugs fixed + clone-by-URL feature added:

1. Close-issue not vanishing — root cause was THREE overlapping bugs: resolve_hub_root preferring stale nested worktree, ensure_hub_cache_worktree wiping in-flight CLI writes via reset --hard on dirty trees, and crosslink issue close not committing to hub (writes to worktree but queues commit for later sync). Fixed by swapping worktree preference, skipping reset on dirty worktrees, and running 'crosslink sync -q' after every run_cli write action.

2. Init failing — crosslink init writes placeholder .crosslink/agent.json then agent init errors 'already configured'. Added --force to BOTH init and agent init in retrofit path.

3. Clone-by-URL — new POST /api/v1/dashboard/clone endpoint + new Settings → GitHub form (above the org browser, no PAT required). Accepts URL + optional slug override + optional init toggle + agent id. Clones to ~/crosslink-tracked/<owner>/<repo>, tracks, optionally inits.

Verified end-to-end: #170 and #171 now show status=closed in API; atdata went from not_initialized to ready after dashboard retrofit; rust-lang/mdBook cloned via new endpoint landed in ~/crosslink-tracked/rust-lang/mdBook. Full frontend suite 101/101.
